svg.title: LithePG v1.0 app-icon encoded payload gate evidence
svg.desc: Evidence summary for the v1.0 release-helper hardening that requires high-resolution ICNS image payloads to begin with PNG or JPEG 2000 signatures.
svg.text: Slice: require encoded high-resolution ICNS payload signatures

g.text: ✓ RED: package verifier rejected test expectation only after old code first accepted ic10 + 1 byte
✓ RED: v1.0 artifact-only gate old code accepted malformed high-resolution icon payload
✓ GREEN: package_verify.sh now accepts PNG / JPEG 2000 signatures for ic10/ic14
✓ GREEN: v10_release_gate.sh applies the same check inside LithePG.app.zip
Artifact-only preflight: clear for current local dist/LithePG.app.zip with matching SHA-256.
Dogfood check: blocked locally because Docker is unavailable in this cron environment.
